# Digital Story Studio — AI Context File
# https://digitalstorystudio.in

## About
Digital Story Studio is a professional photography and videography studio based in Delhi, India.
We specialise in wedding videography, event coverage, pre-wedding shoots, and creative commercial photography
across Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon and the wider NCR region.

## Services
- Wedding Videography: Cinematic, Traditional, Luxury, Destination, Drone, Documentary, Highlight/Teaser
- Wedding Photography: Candid, Traditional, Luxury, Destination, Pre-wedding
- Event Videography: Birthday, Anniversary, Corporate, Baby Shower, School Events, Product Launch, Concerts, Sports
- Jewellery / Fashion Photography: Model Shoot, Jewellery Shoot, Portfolio, Maternity, Newborn
- Creative Shoot: Advertising, Product, E-Commerce, Real Estate, Food, Brand Promotion, Music Video, Short Film, Magazine, Fitness, Green Screen, Industrial
- Others: Naming Ceremony, Mundan/First Haircut, Engagement/Roka, Religious/Puja, Family Portraits
